seo.title: Rollercoin Calculator | Earnings & Withdrawal Calculator
seo.description: Free Rollercoin earnings calculator. Calculate your daily, weekly, and monthly crypto mining rewards. BTC, ETH, DOGE, SOL and more.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: RollerCoin Calculator is an independent analytical tool developed to help RollerCoin players optimize their mining strategies.
about.f1: Earnings Calculator — View your daily, weekly, and monthly crypto earnings in USD.
about.f2: Withdrawal Timer — Find out exactly how long it takes to reach the minimum withdrawal limit.
about.f3: Power Simulator — Simulate how adding new miners or parts will affect your overall profitability.
about.f4: Live Market Data — Real-time exchange rates via Binance API for the most accurate results.
about.note: Note: This tool is independent and not affiliated with the official RollerCoin team. Data is based on the values entered; actual earnings may vary based on live game conditions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: 1. Why are my earnings constantly changing?
faq.a1: Earnings in RollerCoin are not static. The 'Network Power' of your chosen coin changes second by second. When other players allocate their power to that coin or buy new miners, the total network power increases. Even if your personal power remains constant, your share of the pie decreases because the total pool got larger. Additionally, due to crypto market volatility, the USD equivalent of your earnings changes live.
faq.q2: 2. How do I know which league I am in?
faq.a2: You are assigned a league based on your total active 'League Power' in the game. When you enter your Username in our calculator to fetch data via the API, the tool automatically detects the exact league assigned to you by the game. If you are entering your power data manually, the calculator in 'Auto' mode places you in the approximately correct league based on your hash power sum. If it's incorrect, you can change your league manually from the dropdown menu.
faq.q3: 3. Which coin is the most profitable to mine?
faq.a3: There is no single correct answer for this because reward rates and the market price of coins (e.g., BTC, SOL, DOGE, etc.) change constantly. By looking at the USD column in our 'Earnings' table, you can see in seconds which coin offers the highest fiat return under the current network conditions. Remember, the highest USD yielding coin is generally the most logical choice, but you should also factor in the future potential price appreciation of that coin.
faq.q4: 4. How does the Withdraw Timer work?
faq.a4: This tool takes your current balance in the game and your real-time production (earning) rate to calculate exactly how many days and hours it will take for you to reach the minimum withdrawal limit for that specific coin. Since this calculation is based on current network power, an increase in network power might extend the withdrawal timeline.
faq.q5: 5. What is the Power Simulator used for?
faq.a5: If you are planning to spend your RLT or crypto to buy a new Miner or Rack, this tab allows you to simulate the purchase. When you enter the new hardware's Raw Power and Bonus Percentage, it adds it to your existing power and instantly shows what your new total power and new earnings will be. This helps you avoid making unprofitable miner purchases.
faq.q6: 6. How often is the data updated?
faq.a6: When you fetch data via the API (using your username or the 'Fetch Data' button), all league powers, block rewards, and block durations are pulled directly from the RollerCoin servers in real-time. Cryptocurrency prices are fetched from the Binance exchange API (with CoinGecko as a fallback) and reflect the live market rates at that exact moment. The data is cached locally for 5 minutes to avoid excessive API calls.
faq.q7: 7. Why does my league change automatically?
faq.a7: The calculator has an 'Auto League' detection feature. Based on your total qualifying power (Miners + Bonus + Rack power, excluding Games/Temp/Freon), it automatically places you in the correct league tier. If the auto-detection is incorrect or you want to explore a different league's earnings, you can disable 'Auto' mode and manually select any league from the dropdown menu.
faq.q8: 8. What is the difference between 'Current Power' and 'Max Power'?
faq.a8: 'Current Power' includes ALL power sources: Miners, Racks, Games (mini-game power), Temporary Power, Freon, and Bonuses. This is the total power used for block reward calculations. 'Max Power' (or League Power) only includes Miners + Racks + Bonus power and determines which league you belong to. Games, Temporary, and Freon power do NOT affect your league placement but do increase your mining earnings.
faq.q9: 9. Can I use this calculator on mobile devices?
faq.a9: Yes, the calculator is fully responsive and works on all modern mobile browsers including Chrome, Safari, and Firefox. The interface automatically adapts to smaller screens with touch-friendly controls. You can also install it as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on your home screen for quick access.

guides.title: RollerCoin Strategy Guides
guides.g1_p: If you are new to the RollerCoin world, your priority should be playing free mini-games regularly to keep your persistent power (PC level) at the maximum possible level. Game Strategy: Play around 40-50 games a day to upgrade your PC to Level 4. This ensures the hash power you gain from games lasts for a full 7 days. Focus on quick games like Cryptonoid. In the beginning, allocate 100% of your power to mining RLT so you can build a budget for miners later.
guides.g2_p: Big profits come from well-planned investments during Progression Events rather than daily raw mining. Tactic: Always keep a reserve of RLT in your account. When a Progression Event starts, flipping items on the marketplace or trading to gather event points will yield exclusive event miners for much lower costs.
guides.g3_p: The biggest mistake players make is buying miners with high raw power while ignoring Bonus Power. Every unique miner in your collection applies its bonus percentage to the raw power of your entire room. Example: If you have 100 Ph/s and 10% bonus, you get an extra 10 Ph/s for free. Bonuses only apply to unique miners in your collection.

support.title: Support & Referrals
support.p1: If you would like to support the development of this project, you can use the channels below. Every donation and referral support helps cover server costs and add new features.
support.disclaimer: None of the links, games, or Telegram bots shared here are our official sponsors. We have no developer affiliation with any of these projects. None of this is Financial Advice (NFA). These are just tools we personally use and find interesting. If you wish to support our site, you can register for these services using our referral links below.

desc.chainers: A fun and growing Web3 crypto game where you can get free NFTs or tokens daily. Gather free cards to progress.
desc.chainersHeroes: The Telegram integration of the Chainers ecosystem. Earn in-game rewards by tapping and completing quests.
desc.rollerTap: With Rollertap, you can earn rewards by clicking and transfer the rewards you’ve earned to your Rollercoin account.
desc.solsiege: Sol Siege is an idle auto-battle wave defender built natively on Solana.
desc.mystNodes: An infrastructure-sharing project that allows you to earn crypto (MYST) by running a lightweight node on your device.
desc.grass: Share internet, earn $GRASS! Start your passive income journey now.
desc.immutable: A leading Web3 gaming platform where you can discover, play, and earn in next-generation crypto games.
desc.honeygain: Earn passive income effortlessly by securely sharing your unused internet bandwidth.
desc.freecash: Earn crypto, gift cards, and cash by playing games, completing surveys, and testing apps.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: RollerCoin Calculator respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your data.
privacy.s1_p: We do not collect personal data. There is no account creation, registration, or login on this site. We do not request or store your name, email address, or phone number.
privacy.s2_p: When you visit our site, technical data such as anonymized IP address, browser type, and visit time may be collected for analytics.
privacy.s3_p: Our site uses cookies through third-party services like Google Analytics and Google AdSense. You can manage cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s4_p: We store your preferences (language, settings) in your browser's localStorage. This data remains only on your device.
privacy.s5_p: For any questions, you can visit the GitHub page.
